rationale: Current role at Initech (fictional/honeypot company) and career is entirely Android/mobile and Java backend development with no ML, IR, or ranking experience; AI exposure is self-described as 'self-learner level' with a small RAG side project only.

Advanced Learning to Rank skill with 55 months duration and advanced Milvus (vector DB) experience, combined with ML engineering roles at AI product companies Rephrase.ai and Yellow.ai, though primary project focus has been NLP classification and time-series forecasting rather than production search/retrieval pipeline ownership.

IIT Bombay B.Tech and M.Sc Machine Learning are strong educational signals, but 6.9-year career has been full-stack web development at Accenture and Flipkart with no production ML or IR systems; LoRA advanced skill (50 months) appears inconsistent with actual work history.
